headline: Wells Fargo Raises Chubb (CB) PT, Citizens Calls it a Top Pick
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 23, Elyse Greenspan at Wells Fargo raised the price recommendation on Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) to $333 from $321. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm said Chubb shares moved lower as commentary around […]
